Portfolio

Selected Projects

01

Restaurant · 2023

Dirty Burger & Ribs

Full fit-out of a new restaurant. We built a steel-clad service counter and handled all carpentry and finishing throughout the dining room and kitchen.

RestaurantSteel CounterCarpentry Finish
02

Residential · Exterior

Cladding, New Windows & Glass Railing

Full exterior renovation on a two-storey house — corrugated cladding, new window and door installation, and a glass railing on the balcony.

Corrugated CladdingWindow InstallationGlass Railing
03

Residential · Interior

Full Interior Fit-out — Shell to Finished Home

Complete interior work on a house from bare shell to finished home — plastering, painting, ceiling boards and full fit-out.

Plastering & PaintingCeiling BoardsFit-out
04

Residential · Exterior · Multi-unit

Cladding — Multi-unit Building

Exterior cladding on a multi-unit residential building — dark corrugated panels installed in winter conditions, frost and snow included.

Corrugated CladdingMulti-unitWinter Work
05

Residential · Bathroom

Full Bathroom Renovation

Complete bathroom renovation from scratch — plumbing, screeded floor, framing and tiling. Timelapse video coming soon.

PlumbingTilingFull Renovation

About Us

The people behind
the work.

We're not a faceless company. We're Ingi and Vyga — two tradesmen who work hard and deliver results we're proud of.

🇮🇸

Ingi

Ingimar Helgason

Founder & Project Manager

Experienced tradesman and project manager. Handles communication, quotes and coordination — making sure every job runs smoothly from start to finish.

🇱🇹

Vyga

Vygandas Gurinas

Master Carpenter

Master carpenter with years of hands-on experience. Precision and craftsmanship are not just words — they are the standard.

How We Work

Simple process.
Outstanding
results.

We believe great work starts with clear communication.

01

Consultation

We meet and go through your needs. You get an honest assessment of the project.

02

Quote & Planning

You get a clear quote with a timeline — no surprise changes.

03

Execution

Vyga and the team handle the work with full professionalism.

04

Handover & Follow-up

We walk through the finished work with you and make sure you are 100% satisfied.
